| [https://abextm.github.io/cache2/#/viewer/dbrow/5514 5514] || 140 || [[0], [Introduction], [Learn the ropes of Sailing!], [Get your sea legs - and your first boat - with the introductory Sailing quest,  <col=FF981F>Pandemonium</col>!<br><br>If you need a refresher later,  check the <col=FF981F>FAQ</col> tab.], [1], [5492], [Where do I start the quest?, This quest can be started by talking to <col=FF981F>Will and Anne</col> near the food shop in Port Sarim., I left the Pandemonium early. How do I get back?, The ship that travels between Port Sarim and Musa Point now also visits the Pandemonium. Just ask <col=FF981F>Captain Tobias</col> in the middle of Port Sarim after your first visit!, Where do I get a boat?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> can sell you a new boat., How do I get on my boat?, Once you have a boat,  you can board it by interacting with a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col>. Look for the <col=FF981F>white and red wind sock</col> on the southern dock at Port Sarim., How do I get off my boat?, You can disembark by sailing near a <col=FF981F>Gangplank</col> and interacting with it from your boat., How do I sail my boat?, Interact with the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> at the back of your boat to start navigating. Use your <col=FF981F>Sails</col> to control your speed,  and use the sea to turn., What does it mean when I feel a gust of wind?, Occasionally you'll feel a <col=FF981F>gust of wind</col>. This means the wind is blowing strongly. If you <col=FF981F>trim your sails while the wind is gusting</col>,  your boat will get a temporary <col=FF981F>speed boost</col>!, I lost my boat! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> are able to retrieve and repair capsized boats - for a fee! You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat is at a different port! How do I get it back?, <col=FF981F>Shipwright NPCs</col> will retrieve boats from other ports for you,  for a small amount of coins. You can find one near the southern dock in Port Sarim., My boat got stuck! How do I fix it?, You can access the <col=FF981F>reverse</col> option by stopping the boat and then clicking the down arrow on the sailing side panel,  this should resolve most cases. If you are still stuck you can right-click the <col=FF981F>Helm</col> and select the <col=FF981F>escape</col> option.], [3721], [3623], [Starting this activity will un-finish the Pandemonium quest,  clear your inventory and equipment,  and delete any boats you have. Do you want to continue?]]
|-
| [https://abextm.github.io/cache2/#/viewer/dbrow/5515 5515] || 140 || [[1], [Port Tasks], [Complete jobs for rewards!], [Help needed!<br><br>The locals and merchants always need a hand,  so visit one of the <col=FF981F>Notice Boards</col> at a port to see what jobs are available.<br><br>Pick up cargo from the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col> and deposit it in your boat's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col> to complete deliveries at sea!<br><br><col=9F9F9F>For this alpha,  the selection of available tasks has been limited.], [3], [5489], [How do I get a port task?, Port Tasks are acquired by visiting <col=FF981F>Notice Boards</col> at various ports. At Port Sarim,  this is located near the southern-most port., How do I see my current task?, Your current task can be viewed by right-clicking your <col=FF981F>Captain's Log</col> item and selecting <col=FF981F>View Task</col>. Your Captain's Log can be obtained from your ship's <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>., How do I complete a courier task?, After acquiring a courier task,  collect the required number of crates from the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col>,  board your boat,  and deposit them in the <col=FF981F>Cargo Hold</col>. Sail to the destination port,  then withdraw and deliver your cargo to the <col=FF981F>Ledger Table</col> there!, When do the available tasks change?, Tasks are <col=FF981F>endlessly repeatable</col>. Currently the pool of tasks change every day. However,  the team is reviewing alternative ways of refresing the tasks available.], [30903], [3622], [Starting this activity will raise your Sailing level to 10,  clear your inventory and equipment,  and delete any boats you have.
